step_rationale: Coagulation pathway regulator; modulates fibrin-platelet interactions.
mechanism: Histidine-rich glycoprotein regulates coagulation and platelet adhesion, influencing thrombus formation in Type 1 MI.

references.title: Genetic associations for activated partial thromboplastin time and prothrombin time, their gene expression profiles, and risk of coronary artery disease.

Fibrinolysis in patients with acute ischaemic heart disease. With particular reference to systemic effects of tissue-type plasminogen activator treatment on fibrinolysis, coagulation and complement pathways.
